title: Tadhkirat al-Awliya: Memorial of the Saints
description: Attar's biographies of 72 Sufi saints — their miracles, their madness, their closeness to God.
introduction: Attar's biographies of 72 Sufi saints — their miracles, their madness, their closeness to God.

translation.text: The moth does not need anyone to teach it that the flame is beautiful.
